name: checkout_spinner_mobile
raw_note: Checkout seems broken. After clicking Pay now, the spinner never ends. Seen on Safari on iPhone. I do not know if it happens for all cards.

llm_response.title: Checkout spinner never finishes
llm_response.summary: After clicking Pay now, checkout does not complete and the spinner stays visible.
llm_response.observed_behavior: The user remains on the checkout page with a persistent spinner.
missing_information: Whether the issue happens for all cards

expected.title: Checkout spinner never finishes
expected.missing_information_contains: Whether the issue happens for all cards

name: profile_blank_after_login
raw_note: Profile page is blank after login on Firefox on Ubuntu. Reproduced twice. No error shown.

llm_response.title: Profile page is blank after login
llm_response.summary: Opening the profile page after login results in a blank view with no visible error.
llm_response.observed_behavior: The profile page shows no content.
missing_information: Whether the issue is reproducible for all accounts

expected.title: Profile page is blank after login

name: search_empty_results
raw_note: Search page looks broken. Searching for a product that definitely exists returns empty results on Chrome.

llm_response.title: Search returns empty results for known products
llm_response.summary: A search for a known existing product shows an empty state.
llm_response.observed_behavior: The results list stays empty after a valid search.

expected.title: Search returns empty results for known products
